articles.author: Bob Strauss
articles.title: ‘The Audacity’ skewers Bay Area tech elites — and is almost as insufferable as they are - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.description: Billy Magnussen plays a hyperactive, off-putting tech CEO in a fine, if often off-putting itself, comedy-drama based in Silicon Valley.
articles.content:
Andrew Bushell, from left, Rob Corddry, Meaghan Rath and Curtis Lum in The Audacity, a comedy-drama series based in Silicon Valley that skewers tech elites.
Ed Araquel/AMC
The Audacity is admirable… [+5048 chars]
